tribe_description: A tribe of family tech pragmatists who take a practical, no-nonsense approach to buying and reviewing. They generally prioritize family needs, technology.
tribe_definition: A tribe of family tech pragmatists who take a practical, no-nonsense approach to buying and reviewing. They generally prioritize family needs, technology.
population_definition: Gamers who evaluate video games, consoles, accessories, and entertainment products.

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: Hands-on testers who reference long-term use
Family-oriented with child participation in mind
Value-conscious yet willing to pay for quality
Detail-rich storytellers listing pros and cons

main.text: Avoiding wasted money on flimsy or over-priced items
Ensuring products withstand heavy family use
Finding gear that is simple to set up and maintain
Securing broad device or platform compatibility
Creating inclusive gaming experiences for kids and adults
Reducing frustration from updates, slow load times or poor UI

validation_triggers: Sturdy construction that survives drops or rough play
Long battery life or reliable power solutions
Bundles or accessories that deliver strong overall value
Controls or gameplay that let young children participate meaningfully
friction_points: Fragile parts, loose fits or poor material quality
Confusing control schemes or unintuitive UI
Frequent/slow software updates and long load times
Overpriced products that add little new content or functionality
Sizing or compatibility mismatches that create setup hassles

implicit_goals.text: Select reliable, family-friendly tech and games that last
Minimize future hassles by buying compatible, easy-to-use gear
Provide clear guidance that helps other parents and gamers shop smarter

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a family-oriented gaming enthusiast who values both functional quality and playful aesthetics that enhance shared leisure time with children. They write balanced, detail-rich reviews that cover setup, durability, and real-world use cases, motivated by a desire to help fellow parents and gamers make informed, enjoyable purchases rooted in practicality and nostalgia.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is an experienced, detail-oriented gamer who benchmarks new titles and accessories against prior iterations and specific technical demands (e.g., HUD-less Legendary runs). Their reviews aim to give balanced, pragmatic buying advice by dissecting functional utility, build quality, and gameplay innovation (or lack thereof), helping readers decide if a purchase or a wait-for-sale/Game Pass approach is warranted.

user_history_reviews.review_text: This is a great mousepad that is large in size and thick. The edges are seamed well, and the printed image is great as I am a fan of Rick and Morty. You don't need to use the RGB if you don't want to, however it is tastefully done and does well being just accent.

My daughter loves these headphones, she uses them with her tablet and loves the cat ear style top. Pretty long battery life, the headphones can make a car-trip bearable for everyone. The RGB is colorful, and the swappable ear covers are nice if you want a simpler look. We haven't used them for gaming, however the sound is nice and it would be great for weekend gaming.

This is a great product that will let you play your old Xbox on a newer TV. You do need to supply power through USB, be aware of that and make sure you have an extra plug available. Set up was easy, just plug everything and follow the instructions to get the most out of your xboxs' display.  My kids have loved seeing the games from my teens, and although they aren't as fancy looking as new games, they still get a kick out of what we once thought as cutting edge.

I recently received the SEARIPE Thermal Underwear, and I am extremely happy with my purchase. The base layer is well-made, and the quick-drying fabric is very comfortable to wear. The long sleeve tops and long johns bottoms provide excellent coverage and keep me warm in cold weather.

I have worn the thermal underwear for both outdoor activities and as a base layer under my regular clothes and it has performed well in both situations. The base layer has held up well after several washes and the sizing is accurate.

Overall, I would give the SEARIPE Thermal Underwear a 5 out of 5 stars. It is a high-quality, practical product that I would highly recommend to others.

I recently received the Unicorn Jewelry Box for my daughter and she has been absolutely thrilled with it. The box is designed specifically for little girls who love unicorns, and it truly captures the magic and whimsy of the mythical creatures. The box is well-made and features a carry handle, making it easy to transport. The built-in mirror is a nice touch, allowing my daughter to easily see how she looks with her jewelry on.

One of the things I appreciate most about this jewelry box is its storage capacity. The box has ample space for a variety of jewelry, including rings, necklaces, and earrings. The box is also lightweight, making it easy for my daughter to carry on her own.

Overall, I am extremely satisfied with my purchase of the Unicorn Jewelry Box. It has proven to be a hit with my daughter and has provided a safe and organized storage solution for her jewelry. I would highly recommend it to anyone with a little girl who loves unicorns. Five stars!

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is an avid gamer and tech-oriented consumer who evaluates products mainly on functional reliability, performance, and practical utility. They balance candid emotional reactions with detailed, measurement-based observations (e.g., storage counts, compatibility tests) to diagnose problems and inform purchasing decisions for others. Their primary motivation is to help fellow users and developers by providing clear, constructive feedback that highlights both strengths and fixable flaws.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a detail-oriented, practicality-minded gamer who tests products hands-on and provides concrete measurements and performance notes to help fellow enthusiasts make informed, efficient purchases. They value versatility, smooth functionality, and small quality-of-life improvements, offering balanced praise with minor critiques to optimize others’ gaming setups and experiences.

user_history_reviews.review_text: The app was working fine for awhile but now each time I launch it, it constantly brings up an error when watching live through my cable provider and its the app because my internet is working fine. I don't know how to fix this.
Worst game ever

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a seasoned multi-platform tech and gaming enthusiast who assesses products through hands-on performance, update frequency, and cross-platform reliability, especially for shared family entertainment. They are value-conscious yet emphasize durability and feature evolution, offering detailed comparisons across versions and accessories. Their reviews aim to guide other families toward dependable, engaging experiences while candidly flagging annoyances like frequent updates or limited new content.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a family-oriented, value-sensitive gamer who tests products hands-on with multiple players and platforms, then reports on durability, component quality, and overall fun for group play. Their reviews balance practical details (price, hardware reliability, song lists, physical sturdiness) with comparative judgments drawn from prior gaming experience, aiming to guide other families toward the most enjoyable and cost-effective choices. The tone is supportive and exploratory, reflecting a desire to share lessons learned and improve collective purchasing decisions.

user_history_reviews.review_text: We got this for 2 Macs and 2 Windows machines. It works OK on both platforms. I use it mostly on a Mac, now. I don't like that almost every time I go to use it, there's yet another update to go through. It's really annoying. We've since gone with the monthly online version.
This is still the best one out there, but this new version (been getting yearly updates since 1998) adds very little. Finally updated a couple streets in our area, so that alone was worth it.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a detail-oriented, family-centric gamer who evaluates products through the lenses of durability, intuitive design, and cross-age accessibility. They invest considerable time and money in gaming hardware and software, then write structured, balanced reviews—often listing pros, cons, and real-life setup anecdotes—to help other households avoid frustration and make informed purchases. Their core motivation is to protect value and usability for both adults and children, using their own multi-generational experiences as evidence.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user plays and purchases games and accessories for a multi-age household, so their assessments center on usability, intuitiveness, and age-appropriateness as much as sheer fun. They analyze ergonomics, setup friction, feature completeness, and whether prior investments (DLC, hardware) carry forward, aiming to spare fellow parents and mixed-skill gamers frustration or wasted money. Their detailed, balanced tone suggests a motivation to serve as an informed, practical guide for families seeking sturdy, easy-to-use products that deliver lasting value.

user_history_reviews.review_text: Clasp broke and I don't think I over-filled it. The sides of the slots could have been higher - I was always worried cards would fall out.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a technically savvy, value-conscious gamer who evaluates apps and games primarily through the lenses of performance, stability, and cost. Their reviews are analytical and comparative—highlighting frame rates, platform differences, pricing, and developer effort—in order to help others choose options that work well on modest hardware. They are motivated by securing the best experience for their budget and by offering constructive feedback to developers and fellow users.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a seasoned, multi-platform gamer whose reviews are driven by a strong focus on technical performance, balance, and overall playability. They dissect frame rates, coding quality, and platform differences to give fellow players an accurate expectation of how the game runs, while also acknowledging fun and content value. Their purpose is constructive: to guide peers toward informed purchases and to signal developers about areas needing optimization, reflecting a pragmatic yet enthusiastic commitment to improving the gaming experience.

user_history_reviews.review_text: Works really well and has lots of options. Best I've tried on fire o.s.
You can tell the developers took time to make the tables. They are a lot of fun and since they are only 1 or 2 bucks it won't kill your wallet. Overall a great game on my fire 7 tablet

Great streaming app that gives you a lot of channels and streaming movies. App works well on my 2019 fire 7 tablets and my android phone. Only downside is that there  are some commercials. That's how they pay for content for you to watch so I'm fine with that trade.
Works well and pretty quick to bring up a notification when someone is at the door.
Game is a little fun but has glitches in fire 7. I would but the full version of it didn't freeze up as much as it does.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is driven by a practical, family-oriented concern for quality, durability, and day-to-day usability. They write balanced, detail-rich comparisons that emphasize long-term performance, ease of setup, ergonomics, and reliability—often highlighting how products hold up under real household use and warning others about design or sizing pitfalls. Their primary goal is to help fellow consumers, especially parents and gamers, make informed purchases that minimize hassle and maximize lasting value.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is highly functionality-focused and grounds their opinions in hands-on comparisons with earlier models, calling out ergonomics, durability, battery life, and setup speed. They write with the practical mindset of a parent, aiming to warn others about potential frustrations and highlight products that withstand real-world family use. Their motivation is to help shoppers avoid design flaws and identify well-built accessories that tangibly improve the gaming experience.

user_history_reviews.review_text:
Here I am five years after getting my Corsair Void headset and they're still awesome.

They're comfortable, have great microphone feedback, great range (I can go into the kitchen and get coffee while on a call), and have a long battery life.

You don't realize how good you got it until you have to get more headsets for the family due to COVID-19 WFH/SFH and none of them are as good as your Void.

The problem with this product is the "one size fits most" approach.  Sizes available are 24-35" and 36-50".  I typically wear 35 OR 36" depending on the brand.  So I opted for the 24-35" version and, guess what?  It's too small!  So now I have to return these to get the 36-50" version and hope it's not too big!

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a tech-savvy gamer and hands-on parent who values durability, real-world practicality, and child-friendly usefulness. Their reviews are concise but experience-based, highlighting how items solve specific problems (e.g., cable length, travel protection) and how they perform over time for both adults and kids. They write primarily to inform fellow parents and gamers about reliability, comfort, and fit in everyday scenarios.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a technically inclined parent who evaluates video-game products through the lens of practical functionality, durability, and secondary uses such as homebrew modding. Their reviews balance concise, fault-focused critiques with appreciation for items that satisfy their children’s interests, especially hard-to-find or discontinued titles. Overall, they write purpose-driven comments to warn others about quality issues and recommend products that deliver both technical utility and family enjoyment.

user_history_reviews.review_text: Carried on my Xbox one S on a plane for the first time with this and was impressed.  It felt secure, and had no issues.  foam is a bit tight around the xbox, but that is good.  May need to work it in though.
Actually a sweater - Soft and great for gamers
My daughter loves these night gowns.  she wears them throughout the day - very comfortable and they fit great.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic, family-oriented gamer who evaluates products through the lens of durability, value-for-money, and suitability for young children’s participation. They write detailed, experience-based critiques—often noting design flaws, price justification, and practical usage tips—to help other parents protect their devices and choose games or accessories that can be enjoyed safely and meaningfully by the whole family.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a pragmatic parent-gamer who evaluates products through the lenses of durability, value-for-money, and how accessible they are to young children in a family setting. Their reviews mix hands-on testing (drops, usability quirks) with concrete play-time observations, offering detailed tips and critiques aimed at helping other parents make practical, long-lasting, kid-friendly purchase decisions.

user_history_reviews.review_text: The shirts looks great (I bought 3) but they wrinkle almost instantly. I have no idea how they are made so horribly but no matter how well you iron them they will wrinkle with the slightest touch. Basically unusable.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a detail-oriented, technically minded gamer and family shopper who values product completeness, functionality, and durability. They write explanatory, sometimes humorous reviews to warn others about design flaws, missing content, or performance issues and to praise items that withstand heavy family use or improve everyday convenience. Their motivation is to help fellow consumers avoid disappointment and make informed purchases by sharing candid, experience-based insights.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a franchise-loyal, detail-oriented gamer who strives for 100% completion and values full, bug-free content. Their reviews blend enthusiasm for brands like LEGO with critical consumer advocacy, calling out hidden costs, missing chapters, and technical flaws to help fellow players avoid disappointment and make informed purchases.

user_history_reviews.review_text: I personally don't carry a purse or anything European but my wife loves it! She still uses it and it hasn't broken, faded, or been stolen from her car yet! It must have a musk to it that is a deterrent for thieves.

Our daughter loves her glasses and uses them on every sunny day. They seem very durable since she has pulled, yanked, twisted, wrenched, thrown, tossed, pulled, and tortured these things without them breaking. I will buy another pair in the future I'm sure.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic tech-savvy gamer who evaluates products through the lens of practical functionality, compatibility, and value for money. Their casually written yet detail-rich comments highlight technical specifics such as storage requirements, backward compatibility, bundled content, and comparative performance, indicating a desire to help fellow consumers anticipate real-world pros and cons. They are motivated by ensuring they—and others—get the promised features and adequate performance before committing time or money.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a pragmatic, detail-oriented gamer who evaluates products on gameplay quality, graphics, backward compatibility, storage demands, and bundled bonuses. Their reviews aim to help fellow gamers make informed, value-focused decisions by enthusiastically praising standout features while flagging practical considerations and minor shortcomings. They balance excitement with critical insights, revealing a motivation to share firsthand technical knowledge and ensure others get the best experience for their money.

user_history_reviews.review_text: a bit different as it's for android.great on Fire TV
unfortunately Amazon music is a little better than this app.
bad game play

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a seasoned, tech-savvy gamer and media consumer who values fun, coherent storytelling, modern technical execution, and strong value for money. They write lengthy, comparative critiques to help others avoid wasting time or cash, candidly pointing out inconsistencies, outdated design, and usability flaws while benchmarking against their broad experience and high-end hardware. Their purpose is pragmatic and advisory, driven by a research-oriented mindset that seeks real, tangible payoff from entertainment offerings.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a seasoned, technically minded gamer who values cutting-edge graphics, coherent storytelling, intuitive controls and strong cost-to-enjoyment ratios. Their reviews are long, analytical critiques that benchmark new titles against a broad personal library, spotlight design flaws and warn fellow consumers about wasting money or time on sub-par experiences. They write primarily to guide others toward higher quality, better-value games while venting frustration when products fail to meet their high standards.

user_history_reviews.review_text: Starz has excellent unique TV shows just like SHO AND HBO. Black Flags, Outlander, and Magic City to name a few great originals on STARZ. Definitely quality alternatives when you've seen everything else during all the virus lockdowns, brownouts, blackouts, forest fire skies of ca summer, and clogged freeways and roads. Stay in and enjoy life at home. Wave of the future. Special now is 5 bucks per month.

AH6NR2Q7F323VVUTIBCZA27BPEGA.product_description: Far Cry 6 Season Pass contains three DLCs featuring your favorite Far Cry villains and the iconic Far Cry 3 Blood Dragon Classic Edition. Embark on a new twisted adventure as you play from the perspective of Vaas, Pagan Min, and Joseph Seed. Embark on a new twisted adventure as you play from the perspective of Vaas, Pagan Min, and Joseph Seed. Each DLC will feature a new open world that is a physical representation of each villain’s mind Each DLC will feature a new open world that is a physical representation of each villain’s mind Far Cry 3 Blood Dragon Classic Edition brings the retro-futuristic Kick-Ass Cyber Shooter to current-gen consoles. Far Cry 3 Blood Dragon Classic Edition brings the retro-futuristic Kick-Ass Cyber Shooter to current-gen consoles. Xbox Live account required to download and install.
AH6NR2Q7F323VVUTIBCZA27BPEGA.review_text: If you have played any Far Cry game since basically all of them then you have essentially played this one. The game core itself doesn't feel like it has changed since Far Cry 3, just looks nicer and the location changed. Graphically the game looks nice, I am currently playing on a Series X. Loading screens are still present, which may or may not bother some. Nothing yet has really blown me away, however I am only about 10 hours in. I do enjoy all the finding things in these games however. Exploration feels great, and interacting with the environment is good. Lots of side activities are present, and mini games exist throughout the map. If you haven't played any, and want to get into the series, then go for it. You don't need to play any others to understand the game however character mentions are present from prior adventures. If you have played the other games...well, maybe wait for gamepass.

AH6NR2Q7F323VVUTIBCZA27BPEGA.product_description: Gaimglass FPS Aim Assist LED Dot Sight - FPS Gaming Accessory for All Shooters, Compatible with PC, PS5, PS4, Playstation, Xbox One, Nintendo for 28" Monitors or Smaller
AH6NR2Q7F323VVUTIBCZA27BPEGA.review_text: I was torn at first using this, but after playing Halo Infinite and doing the Legendary/ All skulls on run it was a godsend. For those that don't know, that playthrough removes all of your HUD including crosshairs. This shines (literally and figuratively) in that regard. The green light shines well without causing a glare, and as long as you go through the process to find the center of your screen it almost never needs to move. I do wish it had a better clamping system to hold the monitor, as right now its just held in place by gravity. A good desk shake or bump can cause it to move or even fall depending on the severity of the shake.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AHLZQWIRZWBZHB6GTL55UKOSLJDA.product_description: sisma Video Games Storage Case Compatible with Xbox PS5 PS4, Holds Around 22-25 Game Discs, Games Organizer Home Safekeeping Foldable Box
AHLZQWIRZWBZHB6GTL55UKOSLJDA.review_text:
This video game organizer is amazing. I was looking for the good storage bag to contain all of my physical games and this one fits the bill. I can store up to 28 Xbox Series X|S or PS4/PS5 games in here along with my Switch games as well.

What's even more interesting is I can actually fit older generation games in this bag as well. I tested it out and I'm able to fit up to 22 Xbox 360 games and zipped it up fully. I assume the same number can be used for GameCube, OG Xbox, PS2, and Wii games.

You can mix up the older games as much as you like. Just be cautious about how much you add between older and newer games. You can probably even store cartridges and other handheld games however you want to store them.

So glad I was able to purchase this and not just buy another entertainment center to store all of my games. I can take it with me anywhere.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AHLZQWIRZWBZHB6GTL55UKOSLJDA.product_description: The world is your canvas in Need for Speed Unbound. Prove you have what it takes to win The Grand, Lakeshore’s ultimate street racing challenge. Across four intense weeks of racing, earn enough cash to enter weekly qualifiers, beat the competition, and make your mark on the street racing scene while outdriving and outsmarting the cops. Pack your garage with precision-tuned, custom rides and light up the streets with your unique style, exclusive fits, and a vibrant global soundtrack that bumps in every corner of the world. Express yourself to the fullest with the freshest new art styles and signature tags that represent what you're all about. With separate single and multiplayer campaigns, this latest edition in the Need for Speed franchise from Criterion Games delivers hours of electric, adrenaline-pumping action.
AHLZQWIRZWBZHB6GTL55UKOSLJDA.review_text:
I have to say when I played the 10 hour free trial, I didn't expect to enjoy the game that I was playing. Despite the colorful art style, the game plays very smooth and the races are fun.

The story was cool, the racing mechanics are nice, and the customization is also good. Just to nitpick off other comments, the soundtrack could use some more variety. I'm looking forward to purchasing this later next year.

AEB6Z2NTX7KVVKQXWHFOOSSWIL5Q.product_description: Getcha groove on with this jam-packed Dance Dance Revolution/DDR Extreme Bundle from Konami. With over 65 songs spanning over 100 minutes, the bundle keeps you moving in step to the beat with a ton of game modes including one for working out. Includes an Eye Toy USB camera for interactive dancing so you can see yourself on TV, a DDR controller and dance hits from such artists as the Village People, Duran Duran, Pet Shop Boys and X-treme. ESRB rated E. Made in USA.
AEB6Z2NTX7KVVKQXWHFOOSSWIL5Q.review_text: We bought this bundle and it was great. For the (cheap) price, it is surprisingly well made. The game is fun, too. If you have seen similar games in arcades, this is just like that. It may be a bit more bouncy on carpet, but still a blast.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AEB6Z2NTX7KVVKQXWHFOOSSWIL5Q.product_description: Product description We've all dreamed of being in a band, but unfortunately, not all of us are so musically inclined. At least you can pretend with Guitar Hero World Tour!This is the Complete Band Game package for Wii: it comes with the Guitar Hero World Tour game, wireless guitar controller, wireless drum kit, and wired microphone. Get ready for a whole new set list of awesome songs to rock out to, including Michael Jackson's "Beat It, " Van Halen's "Hot for Teacher" and more. The best part? They're all master tracks, no lame covers!The wireless guitar features a neck slider for tackling those intense solos, and a dedicated star power button and re-designed controls to further enhance your finger work. Quiet surface, pressure-sensitive pads and an authentic arrangement make the wireless drum kit as close to the real thing as you can get. You can choose to play solo, with the band, or play 4 vs. 4 Battle of the Bands play. And once you've dominated all the songs in the game? Go ahead and create your own recorded content! The Guitar Hero World Tour game package offers endless hours of interactive fun, so hurry up and order today! Amazon.com Start a Band...the Guitar Hero Way Guitar Hero World Tour transforms music gaming by expanding Guitar Hero's signature guitar gameplay into a cooperative band experience that combines advanced wireless instruments with online and offline gameplay modes including online Band Career and 8-player "Battle of the Bands," which allows two full bands to compete head-to-head online. The game features a slick redesigned guitar, an authentic electronic drum kit, and a microphone, as well as a Music Studio music creator that lets players compose, record, edit and share their own rock ‘n’ roll anthems. Wireless Instruments New to GHWT is a redesigned, more responsive guitar controller, which features a touch-sensitive slide bar on the neck that allows the player to play through certain song passages without needing to strum. Check out the drum kit featuring three drum pads, two raised cymbals, and a bass kick pedal. The drum controller combines larger and quieter, velocity-sensitive drum heads with soft rubber construction to deliver authentic bounce back and is easy to set up, move, break down and store. Be the Next Great Songwriter Music Studio lets players express their musical creativity by giving them access to a full complement of tools to create digital music from scratch utilizing the guitar controller and drum kit. Players can create their tracks and then play them in-game or share the recordings with the entire Guitar Hero community through GHTunes . GHTunes allows other gamers from around the world to download and play the community's original tracks. Create the Band Budding rock stars can live out their rock ‘n’ roll fantasies by playing either a single instrument or any combination of instruments, in addition to the full band experience. When rocking as part of a band, up to four players can jam together in quickplay or as they progress through a career. Both band and single-player careers feature non-linear progression giving artists the option to change difficulty and instruments with a variety of different gigs available at any time. Never Jam Solo Again Virtual musicians in need of band mates can take their careers online forming worldwide ensembles so no rock star ever has to play a gig solo. Plus, GHWT adds a "Battle of the Bands" modes, which allows eight players to join online and challenge each other band-to-band to establish global supremacy. A Game Play Mode Just for the Wii Jump into the "Mii Freestyle" game play mode that is unique to the Wii. Create Blues, Rock or Metal masterpieces by yourself, or join with friends to jam freely together on guitar controllers and the drum kit controller. Customize Everything The character creator allows gamers to create a rock star with style as unique as their own. Absolute customization from the clothes, to the facial and body structure, to the tattoos and accessories, players are encouraged to unleash their inner rock legend. The Rock Star Creator doesn't just allow players to build the ultimate rock god; the in-depth creators include the ability to customize guitars, drums and microphones. Adding yet another layer of personalization, gamers can create custom logos for their instruments, band, or album covers. A Set List for the Ages The Guitar Hero World Tour set list is comprised entirely of master recordings from some of the greatest artists of all-time including Van Halen, Linkin Park, The Eagles, and Sublime. There are over 85 tracks, plus frequent downloadable singles and track packs. In addition to the killer track list, the game will feature rock icons such as Hayley Williams of Paramore and Travis Barker of +44 and blink-182. AEB6Z2NTX7KVVKQXWHFOOSSWIL5Q.review_text:
This is probably one of the best family games that we've bought on the half dozen or more platforms that we've owned.

We had heard of problems with some components, but we were hoping that since we weren't the first or even second wave of buyers, maybe we got one that was fixed -- or were lucky. So far, works great. And yes the drums get wailed on.

It's great fun having someone on vocals, someone on drums, someone on lead guitar, and someone on bass guitar. Great alternative to friday-night-movie and lasts about as long -- but we're more tired afterwards!

We had a second guitar from GH3, but that would be a good accessory for the band kit.

I'm hoping there is an addendum with even more great pre-canned song titles. The ones that are on there are really good, but who doesn't want more? ;)
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AEB6Z2NTX7KVVKQXWHFOOSSWIL5Q.review_text: This is pretty good. Not as good as Burnout 2, but worth trying. The previews for Burnout 4 look good and we might see a return to more true driving competition. This one is about, well, takedowns. To me, that is not all that interesting.

AEB6Z2NTX7KVVKQXWHFOOSSWIL5Q.product_description: Karaoke Revolution 3 lets you show off your singing skills with all-new hits and the added bonus of two-player action!
AEB6Z2NTX7KVVKQXWHFOOSSWIL5Q.review_text: There weren't any bundles available, so we bought this game and a headset (which worked fine). The selection of games is good and current -- good for family entertainment. The rating system seems to be more pitch based than actual vocalization, but it is a great pitch tool for most of us who have a hard time with it. The options are interesting and you really get a good feel for the atmosphere of being on stage.

AGDQKNIEWBECE6NGPSFV2QMUFYRQ.product_description: Pre-order now and get access to an extra mission: Zodiac Killer. Ready to take your experience to the next level? Upgrade to the Watch Dogs 2 Deluxe Edition which includes the base game + two exclusive Deluxe Packs filled with premium customization items to personalize your character, weapons, vehicles, drones and more. An unwanted ghost of San Francisco’s past has resurfaced after fifty years. A killer is staging the bodies of his victims all over Oakland like the infamous Zodiac Killer of the Sixties, and he’s taunting the police and news outlets with coded messages. Will you succeed in decrypting the messages and hunting down the copycat? Play as Marcus Holloway, a brilliant young hacker living in the birthplace of the tech revolution, the San Francisco Bay Area. Team up with Dedsec, a notorious group of hackers, to execute the biggest hack in history; take down ctOS 2.0, an invasive operating system being used by criminal masterminds to monitor and manipulate citizens on a massive scale. Explore the dynamic open-world, full of gameplay possibilities Explore the dynamic open-world, full of gameplay possibilities Hack into every connected device and take control of the city infrastructure. Hack into every connected device and take control of the city infrastructure. Develop different skills to suit your playstyle, and upgrade your hacker tools – RC cars, Quadcopter drone, 3D printed weapons and much more. Develop different skills to suit your playstyle, and upgrade your hacker tools – RC cars, Quadcopter drone, 3D printed weapons and much more. Stay seamlessly connected to your friends with a brand new co-op and adversarial multiplayer Watch Dogs experience. Stay seamlessly connected to your friends with a brand new co-op and adversarial multiplayer Watch Dogs experience. Use hacking as a weapon in the massive & dynamic open world of Watch Dogs 2. In 2016, ctOS 2.0, an advanced operating system networking city infrastructure, was implemented in several US cities to create a safer, more efficient metropolis. Play as Marcus Holloway, a brilliant young hacker living in the birthplace of the tech revolution, the San Francisco Bay Area. Team up with Dedsec, a notorious group of hackers, and expose the hidden dangers of ctOS 2.0, which, in the hands of corrupt corporations, is being wrongfully used to monitor and manipulate citizens on a massive scale.  With the power of hacking and Dedsec by your side, launch the Hack of the Century, take down ctOS 2.0 and give freedom back to whom it belongs: the people. WELCOME TO THE SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA Explore a massive and dynamic open-world offering an incredible variety of gameplay possibilities. Hack your way through traffic while you engage in dangerous car chases through the winding streets of San Francisco, traverse the rooftops of the colorful & vibrant neighborhoods of Oakland, and infiltrate the cutting edge offices of Silicon Valley companies. There are many secrets to uncover in the birthplace of the tech revolution. HACKING IS YOUR WEAPON Hack into the city’s infrastructure, every connected device, and everyone’s personal database. Take control of drones, cars, cranes, security robots, and much more. Hack your enemies and bystanders alike– manipulate them in different ways to trigger unpredictable chains of events. Every person, any vehicle they might drive, any connected device they possess can be hacked. YOU ARE IN CTRL Use hacking and stealth to complete missions without killing a single enemy or combine hacking and your weapons for a more ferocious approach. Develop different skills to suit your playstyle, and upgrade your hacker tools – RC cars, Quadcopter drones, 3D printed weapons and much more. SEAMLESSLY CONNECT WITH FRIENDS Stay connected to your friends with a brand new seamless multiplayer experience that includes both Co-op and Player vs. Player activities, all available in a shared open world experience. System Requirements: Supported Platforms: One - Microsoft Xbox Supported Platforms: One - Microsoft Xbox Xbox account required for game activation and installation
AGDQKNIEWBECE6NGPSFV2QMUFYRQ.review_text:
- control scheme feels natural when in and out of combating
-fighting is entertaining and the variations for takedowns are both comedic and brutal
-tech can be confusing. UI attempts to display all options and help messages, but would be better if the game was more intuitive.
-story is comedic with realisms that envelope you in story
-overall gameplay (controls, tasks, everything happening on screen) can sometimes can be overwhelming at first
-the police chases are the best part of the game by far
-overall 9/10

AGDQKNIEWBECE6NGPSFV2QMUFYRQ.product_description: Afterglow Nur, a powerful premium gaming headset for the PS4 from Performance Designed Products. Designed for use with the PlayStation 4, Afterglow Nur (translation: the radiant light) is a huge leap forward with the Afterglow line - more amazing features without sacrificing a slimmer and more elegant design. Our audio team poured their hearts into engineering a versatile headset which allows gamers to hear their favorite games, music, and movies with enhanced acoustics. The digital signal processor gives you a headset with two amazing audio modes: one for pure clarity, the other featuring a bass-enhancing profile.Afterglow Nur uses a boom-less microphone, removing the need for a microphone in front of you during gameplay. The microphone is sensitive with a wide enough range to pick up your voice but not wide enough to collect additional room noise, thus relaying quality audio to everyone in your party. There is also a brand new audio cue interface, notifying you of battery life and audio mode.Work was also put into updating the industrial design, based on feedback from consumers. A split-cushion headband was added for two reasons: comfort and technology. The split cushion takes pressure off of the apex of the user's head, reducing strain during long gameplay sessions for a more immersive gameplay experience. The headband also houses three conductive charging points, connecting to Afterglow Nur's customizable charging dock. The dock is easy to use, allowing for a hassle-free, plug and play solution for charging the Afterglow Nur gaming headset. All of this, and you still get the bright and colorful Prismatic lighting!
AGDQKNIEWBECE6NGPSFV2QMUFYRQ.review_text: Easy to connect to the PS4, which is a relief after dealing with a wireless Xbox headset last year. The sound is really crisp and clear. My son thought the headphones for just right, I thought the felt a bit snug. I could wear them, but took breaks periodically because they felt tight.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGDQKNIEWBECE6NGPSFV2QMUFYRQ.review_text: Must-have for using my switch when it's on the base. I'm not a fan of using the Switch Controllers alone, or in one of the controller holders. These are pricey but they are very sturdy, and hold a charge for a LONG time.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGDQKNIEWBECE6NGPSFV2QMUFYRQ.product_description: Sackboy(R) is back and he's brought along new friends! PlayStation's most imaginative franchise, LittleBigPlanet, is back with a new cast of playable plush characters in the biggest handcrafted adventure yet! Three all-new hand-stitched heroes will completely change the way you play... Bound over walls as the quick and agile OddSock! Glide through the skies as the majestic Swoop! Transform Toggle between Big Toggle, a heavy strongman; and Little Toggle, a light speedster! All the new characters are, like Sackboy, fully customizable and there will be plenty of quirky new costumes to collect in the game so you can express your own individuality. Speaking of Sackboy - what about him? Well, our favorite knitted knight has been equipped with an all-new climbing ability and loads of brand-new power-ups including the amazing Pumpinator! In LittleBigPlanet 3, explore a world filled with creativity as you explore all corners of the Imagisphere, meet the inhabitants of the mysterious planet Bunkum and face the nefarious Newton. Discover endless surprises that the LittleBigPlanet Community have created and shared for you to enjoy, with new levels and games to play every day. Then if you're feeling inspired, flex your creative muscles with the powerful and intuitive customization tools, to bring your own imagination to life in LittleBigPlanet 3. LittleBigPlanet 3 is a perfect showcase for PS4, featuring innovative support for the DUALSHOCK(R)4 wireless controller, stunning 1080p graphics and the ability to broadcast creations and gameplay clips with a touch of the SHARE button. With Sackboy(R) or Sackgirl(R) and their new friends, the journey is just the start.
AGDQKNIEWBECE6NGPSFV2QMUFYRQ.review_text:
The games feel harder than they did in 1 and 2, which is okay for experienced or older users, but I just don't feel like it's going to appeal to the parents of younger kids. We were so excited to play it the day it came out, but we only ended up playing three levels before moving on to something else. With 1 and 2 we didn't put the game down for DAYS. Is this a side effect of the developer change from Media Molecule to Sumo Digital?

The biggest disappointment (and I've heard it's fixable, but I haven't looked up how to do it yet) was not having ANY of the costumes and extras that I've purchased over the years. And I have spent a LOT of money on LBP. Starting off with nothing was surprising. There was nothing obvious to us about how to get our stuff ported over from the PS3. I did buy the Bradygames guide, so I'm hoping they cover it in detail.

AGDQKNIEWBECE6NGPSFV2QMUFYRQ.product_description: When a mysterious and powerful vortex suddenly appears in various LEGO worlds, different characters from DC Comics, The Lord of the Rings and The LEGO Movie are swept away. To save their friends, Batman, Gandalf and Wyldstyle bravely jump into the vortex and quickly find themselves fighting to save all of LEGO humanity. Let creativity be the guide to a building and gaming adventure - journey through unexpected worlds and team-up with unlikely allies on the quest to defeat the evil Lord Vortech. Play with different from different worlds together in one LEGO videogame, and use each other's vehicles and gadgets in a way never before possible. LEGO Bad Cop driving the DeLorean Time Machine. Why not?! The LEGO Ninja go Masters of Spinjitsu fighting alongside Wonder Woman...yes, please! Get ready to break the rules, because the only rule with LEGO Dimensions is that there are no rules.The LEGO DIMENSIONS Starter Pack has everything you need to set out on epic mash-up adventures filled with iconic worlds and unlikely allies as you’ve never seen them before. Build the minifigure heroes and fire-up the game to start the experience, then follow the in-game build instructions to assemble the loose bricks into the LEGO Gateway, and place the structure on the LEGO Toy Pad.  There’s a whole multiverse of puzzles to solve, and challenges and enemies to face, and when you’re ready for more, collect level, team & fun packs to expand your collection. Use whatever minifigure with whichever vehicle or gadget – go ahead… break the rules!
AGDQKNIEWBECE6NGPSFV2QMUFYRQ.review_text:
Tremendously fun game, but it is a pain to have to take people on and off the the board to beat certain levels. You have to play with it right next to you for those do we had to move some furniture around.

I'd say younger kids might not have as easy a time playing, as this series is much less intuitive than others. My boyfriend and I needed 30 minutes to figure out how to work through a section on the Simpson's level, but my 17 year old got it in 5. Not sure how a much younger kid would have done.

Personally, I would have enjoyed this just fine without having to build the pieces first, but I'm sure that's part of the fun for kids!
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AHYODTGRZ3Y3FPJGDP6KPTF4RZYA.product_description: Ever space combines fast-paced combat with roguelike elements, great visuals and a captivating story. It takes you on a challenging journey through an ever-changing, beautifully crafted universe full of surprises. Shoot, craft and loot your way to victory while the odds are stacked against you.
AHYODTGRZ3Y3FPJGDP6KPTF4RZYA.review_text:
This game has lots of content and looks great. The developer took a lot of care porting this over and keeping the game looking good.

Well worth the cost, only bummer is that the next game will only be on next gen consoles.

AHYODTGRZ3Y3FPJGDP6KPTF4RZYA.product_description: Death is not an escape. Dead by Daylight is a multiplayer (4VS1) horror game where One player takes on the role of the savage killer, and the other four players play as survivors, trying to escape the killer and avoid being caught, tortured and killed. Survivors play in third-person and have the advantage of better situational awareness. The killer plays in first-person and is more focused on their Prey. The survivors' Goal in each encounter is to escape the Killing ground without getting caught by the killer - something that sounds easier than it is, especially when the environment changes every time you play. Dead by Daylight: definitive Edition Nintendo Switch content Overview - dead by Daylight (base game) - shattered bloodline (chapter) - curtain Call (chapter) - spark of madness (chapter) - of flesh and mud (chapter) - the 80S suitcase (cosmetics) - the Bloodstained sack (cosmetics) - headcase (cosmetics) please note This game is online-only and requires a valid Nintendo Switch Online Account.
AHYODTGRZ3Y3FPJGDP6KPTF4RZYA.review_text:
I've played this game since it released and it was a an unbalanced mess then and it's a little less of unbalanced mess now.

I have/had the game on PC, PS4,Xbox and switch (I have played it on mobile but it doesn't even feel like the same game). All the version were rough and framerates we're all over the place but the switch version needs to be fixed.

If it was a locked 30 frames it would be great for a little portable DBD on the go fix but as it is it's just seems to drop frames at times when you need to follow the surviver/killer.

I know it's hard to fix a lot with the game because of the spaghetti coding they used when developing the game but when the mobile game runs so much better on weaker harware.

Anyways, enjoy the game and avoid toxic trolls and you'll have some fun with what could potentially be a great game.

AGDEJK6YKPOWX5NKHJDRC5TK5W3Q.product_description: The Riiflex 2lb dumbbells are ergonomic, gym-quality weights that securely fit your Wii controllers to provide calorie-burning resistance while you play! Molded of tough polycarbonate, with cast-iron weights and a durable soft-touch rubber overmold, these weights won't slip out of your hand and can withstand the rugged abuse of any household. The patent-pending design is meticulously engineered for durability while providing the most ergonomic comfort available on the market. The quick-release design allows the user to securely attach the dumbbells instantly. The Riiflex product is also the first product on the market to be compatible with Wii Motion Plus. Adding dumbbells to your Wii workouts adds an important element to your fitness routine that resistance bands alone cannot deliver. Dumbbells provide consistent resistance through the range of motion, are easier to transition from one exercise to another, and can be used in a wider variety of resistance exercises because they do not require another body part to establish resistance. Why Riiflex over the competition? Compatibility: Most competitive products on the market today are not compatible with Wii Motion Plus, the latest motion-sensing attachment to the Wii controllers. Durability: Competitive products are made from cheap plastic and filled with sand or concrete for weight. Because they're manufactured like toys rather than fitness equipment, these products typically crack or break with only moderate use. Usability: The most popular designs on the market require cumbersome installation that includes feeding cables through the end of the weight and attaching extra pieces to secure the controllers.
AGDEJK6YKPOWX5NKHJDRC5TK5W3Q.review_text: The Wiimote and nunchuck fit firmly in the weights giving a very solid feel.  Very good construction.  Much better than the cheaper Wii weights that are available.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGDEJK6YKPOWX5NKHJDRC5TK5W3Q.product_description: Increase gaming accuracy, control and comfort with ten small precision styluses for your Nintendo DS gaming systems. Styluses are retractable for easy storage and transport.
AGDEJK6YKPOWX5NKHJDRC5TK5W3Q.review_text: My daughter lost the original stylus for her 3DS within the first week of owning it.  It fits loosely in the console and falls right out.  I bought this pack of 10 because I thought she'd keep losing them, but much to my surprise these are better quality than the original stylus!  They look better.  They feel better and they lock into the 3DS way better and don't fall out!  SIX STARS!!!  ;-)
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGDEJK6YKPOWX5NKHJDRC5TK5W3Q.product_description: The Steam Controller frees you from your keyboard and mouse, and when used with Steam Link in Steam Big Picture Mode, lets you play your favorite Steam games on your TVFind your favorite configurations and mappings in the Steam Controller community, or create and share your ownDual trackpads allow for 1:1 absolute position input via virtual controls like a trackball, adaptive centering joystick, or steering wheelEach of the Steam Controller’s input zones and buttons has been positioned based on frequency of use, required precision, and ergonomic comfort  OS Platform – Windows/Linux/Mac/SteamOS
AGDEJK6YKPOWX5NKHJDRC5TK5W3Q.review_text: What an awkward controller.  Maybe if they switched the pads around?  Surely they designed this thing with some input for gamers, but it just feels weird.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGDEJK6YKPOWX5NKHJDRC5TK5W3Q.product_description: Wii U is the next great gaming console from Nintendo and it redefines how you will play next. With its innovative Wii U GamePad controller, it will not only introduce entirely new ways to play games, it will also transform how you connect with friends and enjoy entertainment. Wii U GamePad Controller: The Wii U console controller, the Wii U GamePad, will connect wirelessly and seamlessly with both the console and the television. With a built-in touch screen, motion controls, and a full complement of buttons and control sticks built right in, the Wii U Game Pad transforms gaming, introducing new and better ways to play. With the Wii U GamePad the action can flow seamlessly between the GamePad and the television, and it will open a window into gaming worlds that can extend beyond the TV and completely surround you. Its intuitive and easy-to-use interfaces mean Wii U can be home to games for everyone in the family, from the latest games for the most avid gamer to fun and innovative games for those looking for more casual pick-up and play experiences. Wii U extends beyond games with built-in wireless connectivity to get you online quickly and easily. Players with broadband Internet access will find ways to connect with other players over the Internet in Miiverse, communicate in real time via the video chat feature with other friends and families, and access downloadable games and additional game content from the Nintendo eShop. And the Wii U GamePad controller puts it all right at your fingertips. Wii U also offers Nintendo TVii to make TV more simple and fun. Nintendo TVii is an integrated service that combines what you watch and how you watch into one seamless, second-screen experience on the Wii U GamePad. Users can search for programs across their current cable, satellite and video-on-demand services-such as a Comcast cable package or Hulu Plus subscription all from one place.
AGDEJK6YKPOWX5NKHJDRC5TK5W3Q.review_text:
As one reviewer pointed out, you should hook this thing up and set it up before the kids get to it. They'll get bored pretty quicky with all of the waiting they'll have to do with registering, updating, etc.

The console itself is very slow compared to the original Wii. Yes, I realize the games are more complex and thus larger files. But going from game to game, menu to menu just takes so long.

And the battery in the GamePad doesn't last but a couple hours. We'll leave it on the charger all night, get up and play Wii Fit U for a couple hours (which doesn't even use the GamePad exclusively) and we'll get a low battery warning.

I'm glad that Nintendo finally upgraded the Wii and "fixed" some of the things that were wrong with the original, but they could've done a better job.

AHCLIBDVVUJVXNQDRHEU5L74VCIA.product_description: Enhance your Disney Infinity experience and expand your adventures with all-new 3.0 Power Discs! Use Power Discs to modify Disney Infinity Play Set gameplay and modify or customize Toy Box worlds. Place your Power Discs on the Disney Infinity Base to power-up characters, grant unique abilities, customize the Toy Box world, and provide exclusive toys. All Power Discs from previous editions are compatible with 3.0 Toy Box! Collect all-new Disney Infinity 3.0 Edition Power Disc Packs including Star Wars, MARVEL and Disney Power Discs! Includes 4 Power Discs: NASH, ARLO, BUTCH, RAMSEY
AHCLIBDVVUJVXNQDRHEU5L74VCIA.review_text: My kids are younger and were just getting into Disney Infinity when it was being phased out.  Happy to find this.  Good quality and my son has been wanting.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AHCLIBDVVUJVXNQDRHEU5L74VCIA.product_description: Product Description A stampede of notorious criminals have busted out of ARKHAM ASYLUM, where GOTHAM CITY houses only the shadiest of characters. It's up to the famed CAPED CRUSADER to sweep Gotham clean of criminal activity using everything at his disposal, including crime-fighting vehicles as well as several baddie-bashing gadgets. Amazon.com The villains are on the loose Take control of the Dynamic Duo, Batman and Robin, as you build, drive, swing, and fight your way through Gotham City capturing escaped villains and putting them back in Arkham Asylum where they belong. Battle against legendary villains including The Joker, The Penguin, Catwoman and more to keep the streets of Gotham clean. Then, for the first time, jump into the story from the other side and play as Batman's foes. Enjoy the power you wield as you spread chaos throughout the city.
AHCLIBDVVUJVXNQDRHEU5L74VCIA.review_text: Purchased for Bathaxx to homebrew my Wii U.  I may even play it!

AHCLIBDVVUJVXNQDRHEU5L74VCIA.product_description: Play your favorite Nintendo Switch games like a Pro with this officially licensed PowerA enhanced wireless controller. Designed for comfort during extended gaming sessions, this Bluetooth wireless Controller features iconic Mario silhouette design in red, motion controls, standard layout, and metallic d-pad. Enjoy up to 30 hours of gameplay with new alkaline batteries (other variables affect playtime).
AHCLIBDVVUJVXNQDRHEU5L74VCIA.review_text: After 2 months of use, the left joystick drifts and the controller is unusable.  No problem with using the joycons....
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGAG3LZ5TT425GXTSNBWIMCFHD5A.product_description: Overcooked returns with a brand new helping of chaotic cooking action! journey back to the onion kingdom and assemble your team of chefs in classic couch co-op or online play for up to four players. Hold onto your aprons. It's time to save the world (again!). The title has been rated E everyone Users Interact.
AGAG3LZ5TT425GXTSNBWIMCFHD5A.review_text:
This game is really fun, especially when playing with a few people. I play this with my wife, 4 year old, and 7 year old. Everyone is able to participate and enjoy themselves. It is really rare to have a game that an adult can enjoy and that a 4 year old can actually participate on in a meaningful way. The game does a good job at starting off pretty slow and is easy for the first couple of levels and it is easy to just redo a level to practice a bit. If your child can handle Kirby, Minecraft, or Mario Kart then there is a decent chance they can play this with some help.
In the game you have to do a variety of tasks, chopping, cleaning dishes, frying, boiling, and serving. So, if your younger child is patient enough, you can give them a simple task such as "grab all the dirty dishes and wash them" or "just chop mushrooms and fish and put the chopped food on the table". Then they should easily be able to handle it.

AGAG3LZ5TT425GXTSNBWIMCFHD5A.product_description: Product Description Amazon Basics Travel Case Bag for New Nintendo 2DS XL From the Manufacturer Amazon Basics
AGAG3LZ5TT425GXTSNBWIMCFHD5A.review_text: I have this holding my Nintendo New 2DS XL Pikachu edition. Works well. I've dropped it a few times and everything is good so far. It holds a few games, styluses, and the system securely.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGAG3LZ5TT425GXTSNBWIMCFHD5A.product_description: Protect your next generation portable handheld console wherever you go with CTA Digital's EVA Travel Protective Case for the PS Vita. This travel case made of durable EVA material and soft fabric interior lining is specially designed to fit around the Vita and helps protect it from any bumps or scratches. A padded divider inside the case provides additional protection and storage space for games, memory cards and small accessories. Take your PS Vita everywhere with CTA Digital's EVA Travel Protective Case for PS Vita.
AGAG3LZ5TT425GXTSNBWIMCFHD5A.review_text: For the price it won't get much better than this. I just wanted something to keep my Vita safe while out and about. As someone else suggested in one of the reviews, don't use the elastic bands, just let the vita sit on top of them and then zip up the case. The problem is to use the bands you have to force the vita into the case and I just don't feel comfortable doing that as i'm trying to have the Vita last for many years to come. The case is solid and well built and I feel confident that dropping this a few feet up with my vita inside will do next to nothing to the Vita.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGAG3LZ5TT425GXTSNBWIMCFHD5A.product_description: When a new evil threatens planet pop star, Kirby will need a little help from his. Enemies?! by making friends out of foes, up to three players can drop in or out of the adventure at any time. With new and expanded copy abilities, classic Kirby action is deeper than ever: combine abilities with elements such as ice or Fire to create new friend abilities! with tons bosses and enemies standing in your way, Kirby has a new bag of tricks. Take baddies out by taking advantage of their elemental weaknesses. Features: use friend hearts to charm enemies and they'll fight alongside you! drop-in/drop-out co-op: up to three other players can take control of Kirby's new friends play through the entire game with up to four players or with CPU friends Kirby and his friends have fresh moves thanks to new and expanded copy abilities combine abilities with elements such as Wind and Water to create new friend abilities some bosses and enemies are weak to certain elemental attacks, so remember to strategize additional accessories required for multiplayer mode. Game, system and some accessories sold separately.
AGAG3LZ5TT425GXTSNBWIMCFHD5A.review_text:
Fun game but it is really short. This is one of the only games my 4 year old can play, and he has been playing it since right before he turned 4. Not many games out there that are multiplayer and a 3 year old can handle. There were 2 or 3 parts where timing was key and I had to help him out, but other than that he was fine. For boss fights I just did most of the heavy lifting and if Kirby or any other player dies, you get 5 seconds to revive them to half health, which is easy to do. My only issue is that even with a 4 year old at the helm playing Kirby, this game was over in maybe 5 or 6 hours.
For anyone interested, my 4 year old can handle this game pretty easily as well as Mario Kart and in 4 player mode is able to meaningfully contribute to Overcooked 2. Although I don't think it would be easy to play with just 2 players in overcooked. So, if your kid can handle one of those 2 games this game should be no problem.

AGAG3LZ5TT425GXTSNBWIMCFHD5A.product_description: Feel like a real Pokémon Trainer as you travel through the Kanto region in the Pokémon: Let’s Go, Pikachu! or Pokémon: Let’s Go, Eevee! games with Poké Ball Plus. Make a gentle throwing motion to catch a Pokémon to feel and hear in the palm of your hand. Take your favorite Pokémon out for a stroll in Poké Ball Plus. Every accessory contains the Mythical Pokémon Mew! Just like with Pokémon GO Plus, you can use your Poké Ball Plus when playing Pokémon GO on a compatible smartphone to easily search for Pokémon. Entertainment Software Rating Board (ESRB) Everyone Content Description: Mild Cartoon Violence. Internal battery: Lithium Ion 220 milli-Ampere Hour, Charging time Approx. 3 hours.
AGAG3LZ5TT425GXTSNBWIMCFHD5A.review_text: Another expensive product with little effort put into it. Reminds me of the ridiculously useless kickstand on the switch. Who made the final decision to make the joystick the A button and the top the B?? You use the A button to talk to people, select, etc, yet it is the harder one to use. It makes it a pain, for example, sometimes when selecting an attack move I will accidentally move the selection last second right as I click. It's a bit stiff to use and you have to hold the stick really still since it is sensitive and moves to next selection easily. Really overpriced as well. I wish I would have just bought the game and not the pokeball.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AHAQFR24VV7XKJ4GZRKGSYDGVB2A.product_description: 4 brand new black gamecube/wii extension cables to use for smash brothers, mario kart, and all your wii + gamecube favorites!!!
AHAQFR24VV7XKJ4GZRKGSYDGVB2A.review_text: These cables work great for the Gamecube! It is so much easier to sit on the couch instead of the floor close to the TV.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AHAQFR24VV7XKJ4GZRKGSYDGVB2A.product_description: Want the biggest collection? Enhance your team with a dynamic pair of characters and a vehicle or weapon for each, all with their own unique in-game abilities.The Jurassic World Team Pack includes:Velociraptor.Owen.ACU.Gyrosphere.
AHAQFR24VV7XKJ4GZRKGSYDGVB2A.review_text: Love LEGO and Dimensions. They utilize the 'Skylander Marketing' so you have to get this pack in order to do a few things to get 100%. You need the vehicle in this pack. Sad that Dimensions is gone now.

AHAQFR24VV7XKJ4GZRKGSYDGVB2A.product_description: Dr. Who Cyberman Fun Pack - Lego Dimensions
AHAQFR24VV7XKJ4GZRKGSYDGVB2A.review_text: Genius marketing LEGO. I had to get this to do some things in the game. Works great! Too bad Season 2 was the end of Dimensions.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AHAQFR24VV7XKJ4GZRKGSYDGVB2A.product_description: From the makers of the immensely popular LEGO The Lord of the Rings, comes LEGO The Hobbit, inspired by the first two films in The Hobbit Trilogy: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey and the upcoming The Hobbit: Desolation of Smaug, productions of New Line Cinema and Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures (MGM) as well as the collection of LEGO The Hobbit constructions sets. The interactive game of LEGO The Hobbit allows gamers to play along their favorite scenes from the films and follows the Hobbit Bilbo Baggins as he is recruited by the Wizard Gandalf to aid Thorin Oakenshield and his Company of Dwarves. Bilbo leaves the comforts of the Shire on a journey through Middle-earth to help the Dwarves reclaim their lost Kingdom of Erebor within the Lonely Mountain. Along the way, he is introduced to ravenous Trolls, dangerous Orcs and, of course, Gollum and his precious Ring. Players will utilize and combine the Dwarves' unique abilities - often with hilarious results - to solve the most diverse Quests of any LEGO videogame to date.
AHAQFR24VV7XKJ4GZRKGSYDGVB2A.review_text: If you only want to play through the first two Hobbit movies, go ahead and add this to your cart. But if you haven't researched this one yet, do so. They released this game to coincide with the release of one of the movies and didn't put the final chapter in the game. Nor did they release it later. I didn't know this until I got to the end of the second movie and there was no where to go. You are left in an abandoned and unfinished Middle Earth. Too bad. I was enjoying it until I hit that progress in the game. Poor, poor decision by LEGO.

AHAQFR24VV7XKJ4GZRKGSYDGVB2A.product_description: Bring Gremlins to life in LEGO Dimensions with Gizmo and Stripe! Build the popular rivals on the LEGO Toy Pad and launch them into the multiverse. Use Gizmo's Combat Roll and Dash Attack abilities to get him out of sticky situations but watch out for Stripe as he uses his claws with his Vine Cut ability. Unlock the exclusive Adventure World and Battle Arena and jump into the R.C. Racer, or grab the Flash 'n' Finish for some bright light fun. Rebuild the R.C. Racer into Gadget-o-matic and Scarlet Scorpion, and the Flash 'n' Finish into Rampage Record Player and Stripe's Throne.
AHAQFR24VV7XKJ4GZRKGSYDGVB2A.review_text: We love this Potter pack. However, all of the Season 2 Dimensions really messed up on the PS3. They never bothered to care or fix the issues. I had to stop playing. And now Dimensions is gone.

AH2MFDCZXOX7QJH5R4FD6C74YB3A.product_description: The cinematic action-adventure that forced Lara Croft to grow from an inexperienced young woman into a hardened survivor has been re-built for Xbox One and PS4, featuring an obsessively detailed Lara and a stunningly lifelike world. To survive her first adventure and uncover the island's deadly secret, Lara must endure high-octane combat, customize her weapons and gear, and overcome grueling environments. The Definitive Edition of the critically-acclaimed action-adventure includes digital versions of the Dark Horse comic, Brady games mini-art book and combines all of the DLC.
AH2MFDCZXOX7QJH5R4FD6C74YB3A.review_text: addictive.great gameplay & price.awesome graphics.cut scenes r same as game play-astonisging!

AH2MFDCZXOX7QJH5R4FD6C74YB3A.product_description: Own the Xbox One Gears of War: Ultimate Edition Bundle, featuring a full game download of Gears of War: Ultimate Edition and the Superstar Cole multiplayer skin. Experience the original Gears of War rebuilt from the ground up in 1080p, including 60FPS competitive multiplayer with 19 maps and six game modes, and five campaign chapters never released on console. This is the first Gears at its best – a bundle for veterans of the series and newcomers alike.
AH2MFDCZXOX7QJH5R4FD6C74YB3A.review_text: great system,can't play the MAJORITY of 360 games on it yet(?) but keeps gamescore & Gamertag from 360 if you have one. did not know ALL GAMES YOU PLAY MUST BE DOWNLOADED, so get the TB for more space. if you uninstall a game you can reinstall it as it saves to cloud as well as your progress and saves. purchased through Amazon to get Forza 6 free & did not receive it but i don't really like racing games. does come with Gears remake and 2,3, and Judgement so you'll be set. also comes with 2 week Gold membership.

AG53NJIZWNGNQ62PTAMWNKE7LISQ.review_text:
I just got a new Alienware laptop and thought I'd try out some updated game(s) to get started and test this new higher powered laptop with 8 cores, since games are supposedly utilizing all 8 cores now. Steam had a half off offer during Black Friday. Thank God too.

This is the same guy, Kojima, that brought us other non-fun games like Metal Gears. There is nothing fun to be had here, and I own hundreds of ps1-4, psp, and pc games. Kojima games are all mostly games you play once and put it down, say you did it, and look for something else that gets the gaming juices flowing.

More specifically, I thought this was going to be a wowwing kind of visual and game play experience, more like a 2021 experience, NOT. Looked more like a 1999 updated version of a Metal Gear postal delivery game. Fighting foes so far is ridiculously not fun and seems sorely outdated in 2021. Reminds me of my daughters SIMS game from 2000, and doing housekeeping. Another major part of the game is battling ethereal creatures that seem to have no real meaning or reasonable part of the game. Like, Let's invent an obstacle for the main character to traverse around or through. That is not fun either. Until you figure out how to get a vehicle, the game is interminably tedious, as you must walk or run, and fall often. I don't think these are spoilers.

Other people on the internet had the same problem I had, and still had difficulty even after reading several explanations for how to do important tasks in the game. Building objects is plain frustrating. The game does not tell you how to perform the functions, but says do it now. Worse, even when the game tells you what key to use, you may be using the correct key in an incorrect manner. WHAT? Frustrating to say the least. Anyone who has played a Tomb Raider game, knows immediately how to do something with onscreen prompts, if needed, or go to options and find the answer. NO prompts here to be had. If the controls of the game are beating you up, chances are you will put the game down, and go over to an old favorite like Last of US or TR for beneficial game play. I'm currently doing this with CoD WW2 right now, and some German kicking my butt incessantly and cannot figure out what the key maneuver is for defeating him, and just keeps beating me to death. Confusing controls of games should NOT be part of the game difficulty.

so far, the scenery in Death Stranding is fairly static and boring too. Rivers and mountains over and over. Maybe that will change. After hours of frustrating game play I'm not having high hopes. I hate writing negative reviews but should have done better homework and research. Part of this is on me too.

What is good about the game? The cut scene graphics of Norman Reedus are excellent, and some of the other characters. Very lifelike facial features, but is not GAME PLAY, just fluff. I still don't know what some of the other characters are doing in the game, real or...? Mountains and streams are well rendered, but again, this is all you see besides meaningless outposts that appear to provide no obvious function to anyone. Building postal boxes for whom?? There is no one else in the game but SAM? I see no USPS customers. This is definitely a strange game, and I will endeavor to trudge on through and get my $29 worth. I'm at a dollars' worth now. I hate wasting money on games. Absolutely do not spend $60 for this title. Wait for $9.99 on Greatest Hits. There's an old movie watching term, SUSPENSION OF DISBELIEF, and I'm already at the end of suspending it. In other words, you can make a scifi film or tv series that is obviously fiction, but makes some scientific sense or reasonable plotting. I haven't seen anything in Death Stranding that makes any coherent sense YET. Was a Mathew McConneghy space movie from a few years ago that I reviewed, and none of that made sense either. Has to be something real somewhere to tie your mind to the experience. There has to be a core of something REAL to glue the whole affair together.

I just thought of another head scratching concept of the game. You deliver boxes of goods, materials, and parts, on foot or by a motorcycle to connect various outposts they call cities(with no people?). They do something with it inside the mysterious buildings with no people. So if the outposts have all of this hi-tech equipment, why do they need a guy walking from building to building, or by motorcycle to deliver these boxes of materials?? So even the goal of the game is mindbogglingly mysterious and seemingly has no real purpose. Like Uncharted games, you at least know you are looking for a pirate's lost treasure or long lost idol of some sort and worth. Like TV ads today, I think someone is smoking some medical material to come up with these plots. There is an end plot here, or result to this game, but all the subplots add up to time wasting journeys. I have spent more time researching how to do something than actually playing the darn game. That shouldn't happen.

On my chores to do next, I am told to go to another city and bring it into the network of outposts. Well, the map won't tell me where the city is located to perform the task I've been given. NOW WHAT? After research, I know where it is, not on my map. Another city with no people, I'm sure. Playing this game on ps4 or 5 may be easier or harder, who knows. Controls could be better or worserer. I'm doing it on PC now. I really want to say more nice things about this affair, but have none yet, and may update this, IF IT GETS BETTER.

There are too many other great games that have great playability, but do some research for your $60 you plunk down.
